title: SplashAnimation
description: Play an animation at the very start of the game's loading.
body:
SplashAnimation is a simple utility mod which allows an animation to be played at the very start of the game, which gracefully fades into the loading screen.

### Features

* Adds an animation to the start of the loading process!
* Doesn't slow down loading (and, by entertaining the end user, makes it seem to pass a bit faster)
* A selection of configuration options to customize it for your modpack.

### Usage

* **Following the [tutorial](https://charset.asie.pl/2018/10/14/splashanimation-tutorial.html) is recommended!**
* Put your animation frames in animation/000.png, animation/001.png, ... up to the amount of frames you want to have.
* Edit config/splashanimation.cfg to set more detailed configuration pertaining to the animation behaviour.
* Enjoy!
